# Step Kinds

Choose workflow step kinds by phase and task-oriented group.

Use these pages when you are deciding which `kind` to author. For shared step envelope rules, see [Step Envelope Contract](workflow-model.md#step-envelope-contract). For top-level workflow and component document contracts, see [Workflow Model](workflow-model.md#workflow-schema-contract) and [Workspace Layout](workspace-layout.md#component-fragment-contract).

## Prepare

Use these kinds in prepare workflows that produce bundle artifacts or collect local preflight facts.

### Files and Archives

Use this group for file artifacts, node-side file placement, archive extraction, and structured or textual file edits.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [DownloadFile](step-kinds/download-file.md) | Download a file into prepared bundle storage. |


### Packages and Repositories

Use this group for package workflows that start with prepare-time package staging and finish with apply-time repository setup and installation.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [DownloadPackage](step-kinds/download-package.md) | Download packages into prepared bundle storage. |


### Container Images

Use this group when image archives must be prepared for air-gapped apply runs or verified in the local container runtime.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [DownloadImage](step-kinds/download-image.md) | Download container images into prepared bundle storage. |

## Apply

Use these kinds in apply workflows that mutate or verify target nodes.

### Host Prep

Start here for host suitability checks and low-level node prerequisites such as swap, kernel modules, and sysctl settings.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [Swap](step-kinds/swap.md) | Enable or disable swap and its persistence. |
| [KernelModule](step-kinds/kernel-module.md) | Load and persist kernel modules. |
| [Sysctl](step-kinds/sysctl.md) | Write and optionally apply sysctl values. |


### Files and Archives

Use this group for file artifacts, node-side file placement, archive extraction, and structured or textual file edits.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [EnsureDirectory](step-kinds/ensure-directory.md) | Ensure a directory exists with an optional mode. |
| [WriteFile](step-kinds/write-file.md) | Write inline or templated file content to a destination path. |
| [CopyFile](step-kinds/copy-file.md) | Copy a file from a declared source to a destination path. |
| [ExtractArchive](step-kinds/extract-archive.md) | Extract an archive from a declared source into a destination directory. |
| [EditFile](step-kinds/edit-file.md) | Edit an existing file in place using ordered match rules. |
| [EditTOML](step-kinds/edit-toml.md) | Edit a TOML file in place using structured path operations. |
| [EditYAML](step-kinds/edit-yaml.md) | Edit a YAML file in place using structured path operations. |
| [EditJSON](step-kinds/edit-json.md) | Edit a JSON file in place using structured path operations. |
| [CreateSymlink](step-kinds/create-symlink.md) | Create or replace a symbolic link. |


### Packages and Repositories

Use this group for package workflows that start with prepare-time package staging and finish with apply-time repository setup and installation.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [ConfigureRepository](step-kinds/configure-repository.md) | Write deb or rpm repository definitions. |
| [RefreshRepository](step-kinds/refresh-repository.md) | Refresh package metadata with repo filtering. |
| [InstallPackage](step-kinds/install-package.md) | Install packages on the local node. |


### Container Images

Use this group when image archives must be prepared for air-gapped apply runs or verified in the local container runtime.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [LoadImage](step-kinds/load-image.md) | Load prepared image archives into the local container runtime. |
| [VerifyImage](step-kinds/verify-image.md) | Verify that required container images already exist on the node. |


### Container Runtime

Use this group when container runtime configuration, registry mirrors, or trust policy must be managed during apply.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [WriteContainerdConfig](step-kinds/write-containerd-config.md) | Write the containerd config file on the node. |
| [WriteContainerdRegistryHosts](step-kinds/write-containerd-registry-hosts.md) | Write containerd registry host configuration for mirrors and trust policy. |


### Services and Systemd

Use this group when workflows need to install unit files, reload systemd, or start, stop, restart, reload, enable, or disable services.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [WriteSystemdUnit](step-kinds/write-systemd-unit.md) | Write a systemd unit file on the node. |
| [ManageService](step-kinds/manage-service.md) | Start, stop, enable, disable, restart, or reload local services. |


### Kubernetes Lifecycle

Use this group for kubeadm bootstrap, join, reset, upgrade, and Kubernetes cluster verification steps.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [InitKubeadm](step-kinds/init-kubeadm.md) | Run kubeadm init and write the join command to a file. |
| [JoinKubeadm](step-kinds/join-kubeadm.md) | Run kubeadm join for a worker or additional control-plane node. |
| [UpgradeKubeadm](step-kinds/upgrade-kubeadm.md) | Run kubeadm upgrade apply and optional kubelet restart. |
| [ResetKubeadm](step-kinds/reset-kubeadm.md) | Run kubeadm reset and optional cleanup steps. |
| [CheckKubernetesCluster](step-kinds/check-kubernetes-cluster.md) | Poll and verify Kubernetes cluster health on the local node. |


### Waits and Polling

Use this group when later steps must wait on a specific local condition instead of assuming immediate convergence.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [WaitForService](step-kinds/wait-for-service.md) | Wait until a systemd service reports active. |
| [WaitForFile](step-kinds/wait-for-file.md) | Wait until a file or directory exists. |
| [WaitForMissingFile](step-kinds/wait-for-missing-file.md) | Wait until a file or directory is absent. |
| [WaitForCommand](step-kinds/wait-for-command.md) | Wait until a command exits successfully. |
| [WaitForTCPPort](step-kinds/wait-for-tcp-port.md) | Wait until a TCP port opens. |
| [WaitForMissingTCPPort](step-kinds/wait-for-missing-tcp-port.md) | Wait until a TCP port closes. |


### Operator Interaction

Use this group when a workflow needs a clear local checkpoint or an apply-time value that should flow through register outputs.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [Confirm](step-kinds/confirm.md) | Ask the local operator for a yes/no decision. |
| [Input](step-kinds/input.md) | Ask the local operator for a string value. |


### Advanced

Start with typed groups first. Use the advanced group only for vendor tools, custom probes, or one-off local commands that deck does not model directly.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [Command](step-kinds/command.md) | Run a narrowly scoped host command when no typed step models the action. |

## Common

Use these kinds in prepare or apply workflows.

### Host Prep

Start here for host suitability checks and low-level node prerequisites such as swap, kernel modules, and sysctl settings.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [CheckHost](step-kinds/check-host.md) | Validate host suitability checks on the current node. |


### Operator Interaction

Use this group when a workflow needs a clear local checkpoint or an apply-time value that should flow through register outputs.

| Step Kind | Summary |
|---|---|
| [Message](step-kinds/message.md) | Print an operator-facing message during workflow execution. |
